name: draftloom
author: neotherapper
description: AI-powered blog post drafting. Write in your voice, optimised for virality.

skills.name: setup
skills.description: This skill should be used when the user asks to create a writing profile, set up their blog voice, create a new blog profile, or edit an existing profile.

skills.name: draft
skills.description: This skill should be used when the user asks to write a blog post, draft a post, start a new post, help me write a blog post, or run draftloom draft.

skills.name: eval
skills.description: This skill should be used when the user asks to score a post, evaluate a blog post, check a draft, or run draftloom eval.

agents.name: orchestrator
agents.description: Owns the eval loop — dispatches all agents, aggregates scores, decides next action.

agents.name: writer
agents.description: Drafts full posts on iteration 1 and patches sections_affected on iteration 2+.

agents.name: seo-eval
agents.description: Scores keyword density, meta description, heading hierarchy, and Flesch readability.

agents.name: hook-eval
agents.description: Scores first-sentence novelty, curiosity gap, title specificity, and scroll-stop power.

agents.name: voice-eval
agents.description: Scores tone adjective match, sentence rhythm, vocabulary, and brand voice example alignment.

agents.name: readability-eval
agents.description: Scores paragraph length, subheading frequency, bullet distribution, and sentence length variance.

agents.name: distribution
agents.description: Generates X hook, LinkedIn opener, email subject, and newsletter blurb from the final draft.
